zh.lifeSummary: 當Benedicta de Ludlow於1392年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍德特時，她的父親Sir John de Ludlow32歲，母親Isabel Lingen22歲。她於1410年之前與Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight在英國史洛普爾通結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年在英國史洛普爾通享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾通。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benedicta de Ludlow于1392年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾霍德特时，她的父亲Sir John de Ludlow32岁，母亲Isabel Lingen22岁。她于1410年之前与Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight在英国史洛普爾通结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1444年在英国史洛普爾通享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾通。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ludlow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from a place in Shropshire, so named from the Old English river name Hlūde (from hlūd ‘loud, roaring’) referring to the Teme river + hlāw ‘hill’. This name was taken Ireland in the 13th and 17th centuries. See also Laidlaw .

variants.name: Laidlaw
meanings: Scottish: Border surname found mainly around Selkirk and the vales of Ettrick and Yarrow; a Scottish development of   Ludlow  .

variants.name: Ledlow
meanings: English, Irish, or Scottish: variant of   Ludlow   or   Laidlaw  .

variants.name: Ludlam
meanings: English: possibly from a misreading of w as m in Ludelawe, a recorded medieval spelling of the placename Ludlow in Shropshire. Compare Ludlow .

nameMeanings.name: Benedicta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Benedicte
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Benedicta de Ludlow was born in 1392, in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Ludlow, was 32 and her mother, Isabel Lingen, was 22. She married Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight before 1410, in Tong, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1444, in Tong, Shropshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Tong, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benedicta de Ludlow est née en 1392, à Hodnet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Ludlow, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel Lingen, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight avant 1410, à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1444, à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benedicta de Ludlow 1392 in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Ludlow 32 und ihre Mutter Isabel Lingen 22. Sie hat vor 1410 in Tong, Shropshire, England Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1444 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Tong, Shropshire, England und wurde in Tong, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta de Ludlow è nata il nel 1392 nel Hodnet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Ludlow, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Isabel Lingen, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight prima del 1410, nel Tong, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1444, nel Tong, Shropshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Tong, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Benedicta de Ludlowが1392年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアホードネットで生まれた時，父Sir John de Ludlowは32歳，母Isabel Lingenは22歳であった。1410年以前にイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングでSir Richard de Vernon, III, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1444年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Benedicta de Ludlow(이)가 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 호드넷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Ludlow(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Lingen(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1410년 이전 영국 슈럽실르 탕에서 Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 영국 슈럽실르 탕에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 탕에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta de Ludlow nasceu em 1392, em Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Ludlow, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Lingen, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight antes 1410, em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1444, em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benedicta de Ludlow родилась в 1392 г. в местности ходнет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Ludlow было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Lingen, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight перед 1410 г. в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1444 г. в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benedicta de Ludlow nació en 1392, en Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Ludlow, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel Lingen, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight antes de 1410, en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1444, en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
